_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Integrate cyber planning/targeting efforts with other organizations.
reference_document_element_description: Manage the data and AI adoption program, including stakeholder engagement plans, adoption milestone tracking, barrier identification, and intervention deployment.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.461), OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.453).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.444). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [cyber, efforts, integrate, organizations, planning, targeting] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, ai, barrier, data, deployment, engagement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.890, R=0.865). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Integrate cyber planning/targeting efforts with other organizations." and "Manage the data and AI adoption program, including stakeholder engagement plans," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.489 ≈ STS 0.444 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [cyber, efforts, integrate, organizations, planning, targeting]. WIDAI terms: [adoption, ai, barrier, data, deployment, engagement].
